MX-001.notes: Vibration had been trending upward for two weeks prior to failure.

EX-002.notes: Realigned tread-profile die; readings within tolerance after adjustment.

CP-003.notes: Gasket showed visible degradation from repeated heat cycling.
Sensor had drifted 3% from reference; recalibrated to spec.

CU-004.notes: No leaks or wear detected; pump within expected service life.

IS-005.notes: Preventive swap at 4,000 operating hours per schedule.
